speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere sir mein itna bhari-pan aur dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain
text: Aaj Boss ne meeting mein meri capability par sawal uthaya aur sabke samne humiliated kiya, tabhi se mere sir mein itna bhari-pan aur dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain. Gaon mein Monsoon ki dhokhadhadi se Papa ki fasal barbaad ho gayi aur Sahukaar ka karz sar par hai, isliye shaayad mera sharir bilkul toot raha hai. Mujhe bas ye sir dard thik karna hai taaki main bacchon ke liye kaam par wapas ja sakun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the exact bodily sensation to validate the physical manifestation of distress before addressing the cause.
text: Meeting ke baad se tumhare sir mein itna bhari-pan aur dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan bhai, wahi toh sabse badi takleef hai. Ek taraf Boss office me chillata hai targets ke liye, aur dusri taraf gaon se phone aata hai ki Sahukaar paise maang raha hai. Dono taraf ki aawazein chubhti hain, mere toh pairon mein aaj jaan hi nahi bachi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the feeling of being squeezed between two different pressures, leading to physical collapse.
text: Dono taraf se—office ki daant aur gaon ki pareshani—ek hi waqt par aane se sharir ki poori himmat jawab de rahi hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bina himmat ke kaise chalega? Agar main Mumbai se gaon paise nahi bhej paya toh biradari mein izzat mitti mein mil jayegi. Hum chote logon ka bas yahi toh ek sahara hota hai. Soch ke hi lagta hai chakkar aa jayega mujhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the underlying fear of societal judgment gently after a stigma cue.
text: Biradari ki izzat bachane ka yeh darr andar hi andar bohot ghabrahat de raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere sir mein itna bhari-pan aur dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain
text: Sach mein, itne saal se apni aukaat bhula ke is shehar me kaam kar raha hoon sirf us khet ke liye. Aur aaj Boss ne sabke samne humiliated kiya. Phir se mere sir mein itna bhari-pan aur dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Probing softly into the emotional impact of the public humiliation after acknowledging his sacrifices.
text: Itne saalon se khet aur parivar ke liye sab kuch bardaasht karne ke baad, jab aisi baat public mein sunni padti hai, toh aapko andar kaisa lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Aisa lagta hai jaise main ek failure hoon. Na idhar ka raha na udhar ka. Monsoon fail hone se gaon me bura haal hai, aur yahan main apni self-respect bhi kho chuka hoon meeting ke baad.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the role and duty frame to validate his ongoing efforts despite feeling empty.
text: Apne bacchon aur Papa ke liye itni door reh kar kamane ke bawajood, abhi khud ko bilkul akela aur khaali mehsoos kar rahe ho...

speaker: Seeker
text: Akela hi toh hoon is bheed me. Kholi mein aakar let jata hoon toh lagta hai bas ye sharir dukhna band ho jaye. Kal subah fir wahi local train ka dhakka. Kaise jayunga aisi halat me office?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking an open question to help identify the most overwhelming part of his daily physical and mental struggle.
text: Is roz roz ki dhakka-mukki aur sharir ke is tootne wale dard ke beech, kaun si aisi baat hai jo aapko sabse zyada thaka rahi hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Sabse zyada thakan is baat ki hai ki mujhe lagta hai mere akele kamane se karz kabhi khatam nahi hoga. Sahukaar ka byaaj badhta ja raha hai, meri body kab tak jhelegi? Bas yahi deep sharam aati hai ki main bacchon ke liye proper kuch bacha nahi pa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the deep exhaustion and helplessness connected to his shame about not resolving the debt.
text: Lagta hai ki is na khatam hone wale karz aur zimmedariyon ke bojh ke beech, tum khud ko poori tarah se thaka hua aur andar se bebas mehsoos kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ekdum sahi baat boli. Bebasi hi hai. Kuch bolne ki himmat hoti toh meeting me Boss ko jawab de deta. Par EMI aur gaon ke kharche yaad aa gaye, toh chup rehna pada. Us chup rehne ne hi ye dimaag kharab kar diya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirming his sacrifices as culturally significant and normalizing his silence to reduce the shame of the boss's insult.
text: Parivar ka peth palne ke liye aisi chup rehne ki qurbani dena bohot himmat ka kaam hai, aur boss ki us badtameezi se aapki mehnat aur izzat choti nahi ho jati.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere sir mein itna bhari-pan aur dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain
text: Shukriya bhai, aap samajh rahe ho. Par is dimaag ko kaun samjhaye? Aaj mere sir mein itna bhari-pan aur dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain, aisa lagta hai andar koi hathoda maar raha hai lagatar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Sharing a systemic anecdote to normalize the hidden emotional pain of migrant breadwinners, reducing his isolation.
text: Ghar se door dusre shehar aakar kamane walon mein yeh andarni ghutan aur dard bohot common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki sabko apni parivar ki izzat bachani hoti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haa, humari aam aadmi ki line me log rote nahi, bas pitte jate hain halaat se. Aur fir raat ko dawa kha kar subah duty pe bhagte hain. Bacchon ki fees jo deni hoti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting his strong commitment to his children's future as his primary driving force.
text: Bacchon ke future aur ghar ki zarooraton ko apne khud ke takleef se upar rakh kar roz subah nikalna padta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul wahi karna hai kal bhi. Mujhe apne bacchon ka chehra dekh ke kaam pe jana hai. Par abhi theek kaise hu? Kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka, aap batao kya karoon ki ye dimaag thoda shant ho jaye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing small, actionable, physical grounding techniques that fit his limited time and space.
text: Do choti cheezein try kar sakte hain abhi: ya toh ek gilas thanda paani peekar 5 minute ke liye shanti se aankhein band karke baith jao, ya thoda gunguna paani gardan aur sir par dalo taaki nason ko aaram mile.

speaker: Seeker
text: Paani wala theek lag raha hai. Thanda paani peekar shanti se baithne ki koshish karta hu. Lekin khayal bohot aate hain dimag me jab bhi thodi khamoshi milti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Breaking down the chosen hydration and grounding technique into one simple, executable step.
text: Pehle ek gilas paani bhar ke apne paas rakh lo… phir usme se chote ghunt peena aur bas paani ki thandak par dhyan dena… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thik hai, main peeta hu. Aise ruk kar chain se saans lena bhool gaya tha main Mumbai ki is bhag-daud me. Pata nahi, bas Sahukaar ka byaaj aur Boss ki baatein hi dimag me ghumti rehti thi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing the agricultural debt as a systemic issue, removing the personal burden of the failed monsoon from his shoulders.
text: Ghar ke karz aur khet ka nuksaan us system ki wajeh se hai jispe apka kabu nahi hai, isko apni akele ki galti samajhna aapke kandhon ko aur jhuka raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapne bilkul dil ki baat keh di bhai. Monsoon fail hone mein mera kya dosh? Main toh yahan 12 ghante duty kar raha hu poori imandari se. Shayad mujhe khud ko thoda maaf karna sikhna padega is pressure se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring his realization that he needs to grant himself grace in order to keep fulfilling his duties.
text: Aage badhne ke liye apni mehnat ko pehchanna aur is bojh se khud ko thodi rihayat dena zaruri lag raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ab thodi himmat aa rahi hai andar se. Ye paani pine wala tarika aur aapse baat karke sir ka wo zordaar dard jo tha, thoda halka pada hai abhi kholi me baith kar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the physical relief that comes from finally pausing and releasing some tension.
text: Itne dino ki tension ke baad, thodi der theherne se body ko wakai ek sukoon sa milna shuru hua hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi me. Mumbai jaise shehar me kabhi kisi se aisi baat nahi ki thi maine. Humesha lagta tha akela hi pis raha hu is chakki me. Bacchon ki photo dekh ke din nikal leta tha bas.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledging the relational shift from feeling completely alone to finding a moment of shared support.
text: Bacchon ki muskaan hi humesha sabse badi taqat rahi hai, par aaj apna dard kisi ke sath baant kar ek naya sahara mila hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi toh. Mera lakshya clear hai bhai, sahukaar ka karz utarna hai aur bacchon ko aage padhana hai. Boss ki do kadi ki baatein aur meeting ka tamasha mujhe is raste se hila nahi sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring his focus on duty and how it helps him shield himself from the boss's external negativity.
text: Apne parivar ki zimmedariyon ke samne aapne bahar ke gusse ko haavi hone se poori tarah rok diya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Rokenge nahi to chalega kaise. Ab raat ka bacha hua khana kha ke sota hu. Subah nai shift me jaana hai mujhe time se. Sir ab theek lag raha hai, lagta hai neend aa jayegi ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing rest as a necessary structural tool for recovery, not a luxury.
text: Aise thode aaram ke pal body ko stress se recover karne ka sahi waqt dete hain, jo ki aage ki lambi ladaai ke liye bahot zaroori hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul sahi baat hai. Main dhyan rakhunga ki kal jab bhi office me sir me waisa bhari-pan lage, main khud ko aise hi 5 minute ka break du aur chupchap thanda pani piyu.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating his new practical approach to managing the physical symptoms when they arise.
text: Apne us sir ke bhari-pan ko samajh kar, usko shant karne ka yeh tareeqa apnana wakai bahot kaargar hoga...

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji bhai. Bohot bohot dhanyawad aapka. Is bheed-bhad wale shehar me koi samjhane wala mil gaya, yahi badi baat hai mere liye. Ab main finally chain se so sakta hu.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering final reassurance by validating his resilience and cultural dedication before he rests.
text: Tumhari is majbooti aur apne parivar ke liye aisi lagan ko dekh kar sach mein ijjat aati hai, aaram se so jao aur kal ek naye din ki achi shuruwat karo.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chhati mein itni jakdan aur bhari-pan hai
text: Team meeting mein zillat milne ke baad se meri chhati mein itni jakdan aur bhari-pan hai ki saans lena mushkil ho raha hai. Divorced hone ki wajah se samaj pehle hi tana deta hai, aur ab crop failure se chit fund ke paise doobne ka darr meri neend uda raha hai. Ye chest tightness thik nahi ho rahi aur lag raha hai ki mera dum ghut jayega, bas sharir mein jaan nahi bachi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the somatization exact phrase without rushing to solve.
text: Aap kah rahi hain ki chhati mein itni jakdan aur bhari-pan hai ki ab aapse theek se saans bhi nahi li ja rahi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chest tightness
text: Haan, waise hi divorce ke baad akeli pad gayi hoon. Team meeting mein sabke saamne sunaya gaya toh meri chest tightness aur badh gayi. Aur ab gaon se khabar aayi ki fasal barbaad, aur wo chit fund wala bhi paise leke bhaag gaya. Kuch samajh nahi aa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duty and role conflict between work and providing for family.
text: Office ki zillat aur samaj ke taano ke beech, aapko akele hi apne aur apne gaon ke parivaar ke financial nuksaan ka bojh bhi uthana pad raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Mera toh jeena hi azaab ho gaya hai. Society mein log waise hi divorced auraton ko failure maante hain. Agar unhe pata chala ki mere saare paise chit fund mein doob gaye hain, toh unhe ek aur mauka mil jayega character par baat karne ka. Main kisi se kuch nahi bol sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the stigma safely with a short restatement ending in a soft pause.
text: Logon ke un taano aur aur zyada judge kiye jaane ke darr se, aap ye saari pareshani bina kisi ko bataye akele seh rahi hain...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chhati mein jakdan
text: Sach kahu toh ab sehan nahi ho raha. Ye chhati mein jakdan roz raat ko hoti hai. EMI baaki hai, savings zero ho chuki hain. Kabhi kabhi toh dimaag mein aata hai ki ye sab jhelne se behtar hai ki sab kuch hi khatam kar doon, kam se kam ghutan toh jayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Address the moderate risk flag and hold phase until safe.
text: Itne saare dabav ke beech aapko lag raha hai ki is roz ki ghutan aur takleef se nikalne ka aur koi raasta nahi bacha. Yeh sun ke dil bhaari ho gaya. Kya tum abhi theek ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Nahi, main theek hoon, bas flow mein bol diya. Main kuch galat nahi karungi, mujhe khud ki life pyaari hai aur abhi bohot responsibilities hain. Par sach mein bahut weak feel kar rahi hoon. Meeting mein manager ne meri saari coding efforts ko zero bol diya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the mild risk drop and mirror the relational impact of the manager's words.
text: Aise halaat mein aisi baatein dimaag mein aana samajh aata hai. Ek taraf manager ne aapki lagatar mehnat ko nakar diya, aur doosri taraf financial losses ki chinta aapko kamzor kar rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chest tightness
text: Bilkul. Main 12-12 ghante code karti hoon MNC ke liye. Phir bhi koi respect nahi hai yahan. Aur ghar walon ki aakhiri umeed wo chit fund thi. Ab wo darr meri chest tightness ko itna badha deta hai ki main raat ko uth kar baith jati hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask about the thoughts driving the physical discomfort at night.
text: Is poori ghabrahat aur akelepan mein, jab is takleef ki wajah se raat ko achanak aap uth kar baith jati hain, toh sabse pehle aapke dimaag mein kya chal raha hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Dimaag mein bas yahi aata hai ki agar performance ke naam par meri job chali gayi toh rent aur EMI kaise bhari jayegi. Main akele kaise survive karungi is shehar mein? Mere paas na financial backup bacha hai aur na hi koi support system. Main buri tarah phans gayi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the deep exhaustion of battling these compounding crises alone.
text: Lagta hai ki is sab se akele ladte hue aur lagatar khud ko bacha kar rakhne ki is lambi koshish mein, aap andar se poori tarah thakaan aur exhaustion mehsoos kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dum ghut jayega
text: Bohot thak chuki hoon. Kabhi kabhi toh laptop screen dekh kar rona aata hai. Society ne toh pehle hi mujh par label laga diya hai divorce ke baad. Mujhe prove karna tha ki main akele sab kar sakti hoon, par ab lag raha hai mera dum ghut jayega in sab mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her exhaustion as a normal reaction to structural and social pressures.
text: Jo bhi aap abhi jhel rahi hain, usme thakaan aur dard hona ekdum natural hai. Ek toh society ka itna unfair pressure aur upar se fasal aur chit fund ka financial loss, aisi situation kisi ko bhi tod sakti hai, isme aapki mehnat ya kaabiliyat ki koi kami nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chhati mein jakdan
text: Thanks for understanding. Par reality toh ye hai na ki paise doob gaye. Meri saari savings chali gayi aur manager mujhe waise hi target kar raha hai. Ye chhati mein jakdan aur darr mujhe normal function hi nahi karne de rahe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a systemic anecdote about single working women facing extreme performance anxiety.
text: Kayi working women ke liye, khaaskar jo single rehkar sab manage karne ki koshish kar rahi hoti hain, work pressure aur achanak hue financial setback ka akele samna karna aisi hi ghabrahat deta hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi khul ke bolega nahi kyunki sabko strong dikhne ka bada pressure hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho. Hum sab bas ek mask pehan kar jee rahe hain. MNC culture mein apni problem dikhana allowed nahi hai. Aur gaon walon ko bata kar unhe aur pareshan nahi karna chahti, kheti mein waise hi unka sab kuch chala gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her duty-based coping of hiding pain to protect others.
text: Apni pareshaani ko andar hi daba kar aap office aur gaon dono jagah bas sab theek hone ka jhootha dikhawa kar rahi hain, taaki aapke apno ko aur chinta na ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: saans lena mushkil
text: Haan, dikhawa hi kar rahi hoon. Par mera sharir toh jhooth nahi bolta na. Mere liye ab literally saans lena mushkil ho raha hai is ghutan mein. Pata nahi is poore maze se baahar nikalne ka rasta kya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Prompt reflection on how she currently copes with the physical toll.
text: Raaton ki neend udne ke baad aur sharir ki is lagaatar takleef ke bawajood, abhi aap khud ko office ke kaam ke liye kaise push karne ki koshish kar rahi hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Jaise taise bas khud ko ghaseet rahi hoon. Par aise lambe time tak nahi chal payega. Mera health jawab de raha hai. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha, is ghutan aur darr se theek hone ke liye ab kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer quick somatic regulation strategies suitable for her desk setup.
text: Akele itna kuch sehte hue yahan tak datkar khade rehne ki aapki koshish sach mein bohot badi baat hai. Jab bhi yeh ghutan zyada lage, hum 2 chhoti cheezein try kar sakte hain: ya toh 2 minute ke liye screen se hatkar dono haathon ko aapas mein mal kar aankhon par rakh lijiye, ya phir thanda pani peekar apni chair par back support lekar baithiye. Inme se abhi kya try karna aasan lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: jakdan
text: Main wo pani peene aur chair par rest karne wala option try kar sakti hoon. Laptop ke aage baith kar code karte time hi sabse zyada ghabrahat aur jakdan hoti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guide her step by step through the grounding exercise.
text: Is jakdan ko thoda kam karne ke liye aaiye isko try karte hain. Pehle yeh karo… ek gilas thanda pani lo aur do-teen ghoont piyo… phir kursi par theek se peechhe tek lagao… aur aankhein band karke ek lambi saans lo… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chest tightness
text: Maine pani piya aur aankhein band ki. Thoda relax toh laga abhi ke liye, par jaise hi aankhein kholti hoon, wo chit fund aur crop failure ka thought wapas strike karta hai aur chest tightness wapas aane lagti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic reframe on the financial losses to reduce self-blame.
text: Fasal ka nuksaan aur market mein chit fund jaise fraud hona ek poore system aur mausam ki samasya hai, usme aapki personal niyat ya mehnat ki koi kami nahi hai. Yeh ek financial jhatka zaroor hai, par iska matlab yeh nahi ki aap apni life mein fail ho gayi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh baat sach hai ki climate par mera control nahi hai aur scam kisi ke sath bhi ho sakta hai. Par ek working aurat ke liye, jisne society ke against jaakar apni khud ki pehchaan banayi ho, achanak paise khona bohot chot pahunchata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the pain of feeling her hard-earned independence is threatened.
text: Apne balboote par itni izzat aur pehchaan banane ke baad, jab yeh achanak bina aapki galti ke chhin-ta hua dikhta hai, toh woh ehsaas sach mein bohot dardnaak hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Dardnaak toh hai, par rone se ab EMI nahi bhari jayegi. Mujhe abhi practically sochna hoga. Kal ki code review meeting ke liye achhe se prepare karna padega taaki wahan dobara zillat na jhelni pade.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her resilience in shifting to practical problem solving.
text: Apne aap ko is bhari tension ke beech bhi aage ki meeting ke liye tayyar karna aur practical steps uthane ka aapka yeh faisla bohot himmat wala hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Himmat jutaani padegi. Agar MNC ki job bachi rahegi toh aage chalkar EMI bhi bhar dungi aur gaon mein bhi thoda support karti rahungi. Chit fund wala paisa shayad ab past maan kar move on karna hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her strategic choice to focus on what she can control.
text: Sabse zaroori cheez, yani apni naukri ko bacha kar rakhne ke liye, aapne ab un purane nuksaan se dhyan hatakar aage badhne ka mann bana liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chhati mein jakdan
text: Haan, aur thoda focus apne body ke is stress ko kam karne par lagaungi. Sach bolun toh abhi wo chhati mein jakdan aur ghutan itni nahi lag rahi jitni pehle thi. Dimaag thoda clear hua hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Prompt a small commitment to self-care for the immediate future.
text: Aage ke baare mein sochkar thoda thehrao aane ke baad, abhi bache hue waqt mein aap apne aap ko shaant rakhne ke liye sabse pehle kya karna chahengi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main apna laptop thodi der ke liye shut down karke seedha apni balcony mein jaa kar baithungi. Kuch der taza hawa khaungi, bina kisi code ya EMI ke baare mein soche.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the somatic benefit of her chosen next step.
text: Ek chhota sa break lekar taza hawa khane se is chhati ki jakdan aur bhari-pan ko aur bhi aaram milne ki ummeed hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Aapse baat karke sach mein bohot aaram mila hai. Bahut time baad kisi ne judge kiye bina aur tana diye bina meri baatein suni hain. Thank you so much.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate the connection and relief achieved in the session.
text: Apne dil ka yeh bhari bojh baant lene se, us akelepan mein aapko thoda sahara aur halkapan mehsoos ho raha hai, yeh dekh kar mujhe bhi bohot sukoon mila.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan
text: Boss ki screaming ke baad se mere pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan ho rahi hai jo ja hi nahi rahi. Gaon mein kisan credit card ka loan baki hai aur fasal na hone se remittance band hone wali hai, isliye shaayad mera sharir har waqt kaanpta rehta hai. Is thakan aur sharir dard ka koi ilaj batao kyunki main ab aur kamzori bardasht nahi kar sakti, bacchon ko kaun sambhaalega?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate the physical symptom first by mirroring the exact somatic phrase.
text: Tumhare pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan ho rahi hai jo ja hi nahi rahi, aur is sharir ke kaanpne ne sach mein thakan badha di hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, subah se bas yehi lag raha hai ki achanak se chakkar kha kar gir jaungi. Kaam par dhyan nahi lag raha aur gaon se loan ka phone aane wala hoga. Ye sab soch ke aur dard hone lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the mild risk feeling gently, then mirror the feared consequence of falling ill.
text: Is achanak gir jaane ke khayal se darr lagna laazmi hai; sabse badi fikar yahi rehti hogi ki agar sharir jawab de gaya toh in bacchon aur gaon ke loan ka kya hoga...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan
text: Aur kya. Ek toh single mother hoon, logon ke taane waise hi kam nahi hote shahar mein. Agar main bimar pad gayi, toh sab bolenge aurat jaat se akele ghar nahi chalta. Pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan isi darr se badhti ja rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the stigma cue with a shorter restatement ending in a soft pause, focusing on the relational isolation.
text: Akele sab sambhalne ke baad bhi aise taane sunne ka darr, is poori peeda ko aur bhari kar deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul bhari hai. Boss office mein aise chilata hai jaise main koi naukar hoon, par naukri chhod nahi sakti. Remittance bhejna zaroori hai warna kisan credit card ka paisa na milne par wo gaon mein halla karenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask an open question to probe the emotional weight of this dual burden.
text: Jab boss ki daant aur us kisan credit card ka dabav ek hi waqt par dimag mein aate hain, toh akele is sabka samna karte hue kaisa mehsoos hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Aisa lagta hai jaise andar se khokhli ho chuki hoon. Bacchon ki taraf dekhti hoon toh kisi tarah himmat jutati hoon, par ye lagatar thakan meri haddiyan tod rahi hai. Bahut dard hota hai ab toh.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the deep exhaustion stemming from her duty to her children and the financial burden.
text: Lagta hai akele apne bacchon aur gaon ki itni badi zimmedariyon ka bojh dhote-dhote tum andar se poori tarah thak chuki ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan thak gayi hoon. Kabhi kabhi toh lagta hai bacchon ko gaon chhod aaun, par wahan ka mahaul achha nahi hai aur karz walo ki wahan nazar rehti hai. Mere bacche hi toh mera sab kuch hain. Unke liye ye sharir sath nahi chhod sakta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her exhaustion as a normal response to her heavy systemic burden, separating her worth from the body's breaking point.
text: Bina kisi sahare ke akele bacchon ka bhavishya banana aur us kisan credit card ka bojh sambhalna bohot himmat ka kaam hai; jo thakan tum mehsoos kar rahi ho, woh tumhari koi kamzori nahi balki in dohari zimmedariyon ka bhari asar hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Lekin office wale kya sochenge agar main bar-bar washroom gai pet dard ki wajah se? Sochenge kaam se bachne ke bahaane bana rahi hai ya koi aurat wali aisi bimari hai jiska naam lene mein bhi mujhe unke samne sharam aati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Address the stigma cue smoothly with a shorter restatement focusing on the duration of this hidden pain.
text: Office ke logon ki nazron se bach kar is dard ko lagatar roz chupane ki majboori bohot akelapan lanti hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan
text: Chupana toh padta hi hai. Par wo udhaar ka byaj nahi rukta na. Mujhe bas is pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan ka koi hal chahiye, warna boss mujhe kisi din nikal dega aur mere bacchon ka aage kya hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Use a brief systemic anecdote showing that single mothers carrying debt often experience this bodily breakdown.
text: Akele kamanewali maaon mein remittance bhejney ki fikar aur karz ke dabav se sharir ka is tarah tootna bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi khul ke bolega nahi kyunki sab samaj ki baaton se darte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho aap. Par koi nahi sunta yahan is bade shahar mein. Aap hi batao ab kya karoon main? Main theek hona chahti hoon taaki apne kaam aur bacchon par theek se dhyan de sakun, koi rasta hai kya?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer 2 discrete, practical suggestions for soothing the somatic symptoms at work without adding burden.
text: Is takleef ko aaram dene ke liye do aasan raste office mein try kar sakte hain. Pehla, jab boss chillaye aur ghabrahat ho, toh kya 1-2 minute dhyan thande paani par la kar bas ek glass paani ghoont-ghoont pi sakti ho? Ya dusra, apne bag mein ek choti saunf ya ajwain ki dibbi rakh sakti ho jise dard ke waqt thoda chaba sako?

speaker: Seeker
text: Ajwain wala theek rahega. Meri maa bhi bolti thi gaon mein ki pet mein jalan ho toh ajwain thoda fayda karti hai. Office desk pe chupchap nikal ke chaba bhi lungi aur kisi ko is bheed mein pata bhi nahi chalega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk her step-by-step through the ajwain strategy at work.
text: Pehle ek choti dibbi mein ajwain apne bag ya desk par chupchap rakh lo... phir jab bhi boss ki daant se marod shuru ho, bina kisi ko bataye ek chutki muh mein daal lo aur dheere-dheere chabao... bas itna hi aaj ke liye office mein karna.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sharir har waqt kaanpta rehta hai
text: Haan, ye main asani se kar sakti hoon. Is se shayad jo ye mera sharir har waqt kaanpta rehta hai tension se, usme thodi shanti milegi aur dhyan boss ki us kadwi baaton se thoda hat jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic reframe linking debt-related financial distress directly to physical stomach issues.
text: Zaroor madad milegi; yaad rakhna ki jab remittance aur kisan credit card ka itna bada tension lamba bana rehta hai, toh hamara dimag us darr ko aksar isi marod aur dard ke roop mein hi bahar nikalta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan
text: Matlab ye sach mein koi jaanlewa ya aurat wali bimari nahi hai, bas mere dimaag ka yahi darr hai jo pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan banke ubhar raha hai? Ye sun kar mere andar ki aadhi fikar toh waise hi kam ho gai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her realization and how her duty-bound fear was manifesting in her body.
text: Apne sharir ke is ishaare ko ab tum behtar samajh pa rahi ho, ki yeh peeda asal mein tumhari apne bacchon aur us gaon ko bachane ki utni hi badi farz ki fikar ka asar hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Farz toh kabhi khatam nahi hoga jab tak gaon wala pura loan wapas nahi le leta. Par kam se kam ab main office mein is dard se utna darungi nahi aur kaam pe dhyan de paungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the long duration of the pending debt and her shift in perspective.
text: Jab tak woh udhaar lamba khinchega aur poori tarah chukta nahi hota, thodi tension rahegi, par uske sath apne is dard se na darne ka yeh badlaav sach mein zaruri hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi baat hai. Apne bacchon ke liye toh har darr se ladna padega. Unhe acchi padhai deni hai toh us boss ki wo jhidki bhi sehni padegi aur ye apna dard bhi sambhalna hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the duty to her children that drives her resilience.
text: Bacchon ko aage badhane ki aur unhe ek accha kal dene ki tumhari yahi bhari chahat tumhe har din us office ki daant aur takleef dono se akele ladte rehne ki himmat deti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji, bilkul. Ek aur baat kahu... raat ko jab bacche so jate hain tab phir se mujhe akelapan lagta hai. Din ki sari thakan aur gaon se agle din phone aane ka darr ek sath haawi hota hai. Us waqt ke liye kya karu?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a small, realistic nighttime grounding step.
text: Raat ke us akelepan mein, kya bacchon ke sone ke baad sirf 5 minute shaanti se let kar kisi achhi puraani baat ke bare mein soch sakti ho? Ya unke sir par dheere se haath pherte hue apna sara dhyan unki sanson par laga sakti ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Bacchon ke sir par hath pherna... ye toh main waise bhi karti hoon pyar se, par us waqt bhi dhyan udhaar par hi rehta tha. Ab se unki un masoom sanson par dhyan lagungi. Mujhe isse pakka thoda aaram milega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm her dedication to her children and her capacity to find small pockets of peace.
text: Apne unhi masoom bacchon mein sukoon dhoondhne ka tumhara yeh tarika batata hai ki kitni mushkilon aur taano ke bawajood, ek single maa ke roop mein tumhara pyar sabse badi takat hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sharir har waqt kaanpta rehta hai
text: Shayad maa hone ka yahi sabse bada matlab hai yahan. Sab kuch seh kar bhi unke liye khade rehna. Jo mera sharir har waqt kaanpta rehta hai, wo ab aage se apne bacchon ke liye toh majboot ban hi jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her relational bond with her children acting as her source of bodily strength.
text: Apne bacchon ke liye har haal mein tike rehne ka aur is kamzori ko theek karne ka ye ehsaas hi tumhare is kaanpte hue sharir mein ek nayi jaan phook raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji, ab lag raha hai ki sach mein main aage badh sakti hoon. Ajwain wali dibbi toh kal subah hi office bag mein rakh lungi. Aapne meri baat itne aaram se suni na, usse hi aaj dimaag ka kaafi bojh halka ho gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reiterate the normalization of offloading her worries as structurally helpful.
text: Is dil ke bojh ko kisi ke sath bina darr baant lena aur asaliyat samjhna, sharir ke is dard ko din-b-din kam karne ka sabse accha tareeqa hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan
text: Kaash ye aasan si baat mujhe pehle pata hoti toh itne din us pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan ko akele nahi sehti, sab logon ke darr se andar daba kar rakh leti thi. Par chalo, der se hi sahi aaj thoda theek rasta toh mila.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the shift from hiding the pain for so long to finding a path forward.
text: Itne dino tak akele sab chupchap sehne ke baad, aaj ye rasta aur himmat aana tumhare aage ke poore safar ko thoda asaan zaroor bana dega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, umeed hai ab aur asaan ho jayega aage ka rasta. Raat bhi bahut ho gai hai ab aur dono bacche sone ki hi tayari mein hain. Main ab jaati hoon unke paas. Shukriya sunne ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a warm closing, affirming her readiness for tomorrow.
text: Apne bacchon aur us gaon ki itni fikr ke bawajood kal ki nayi subah aur us office ki duty ke liye dobara taiyar rehna tumhari asal himmat hai, aaram se so jao.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere poore jism mein ek ajeeb sa sunn-pan aur bhari-pan
text: Meeting mein sabke samne mazaak banne ke baad se mere poore jism mein ek ajeeb sa sunn-pan aur bhari-pan chha gaya hai. Savings wipe out ho chuki hain aur moneylender ka dabav har din badh raha hai, isi wajah se shaayad meri aankhon mein har waqt jalan aur neend ki kami rehti hai. Ye thakan itni hai ki bacchon ke school ka lunch box banane ki bhi himmat nahi bachi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the exact somatic phrase to validate the Seeker's physical experience of the stressor.
text: Aisa lag raha hai ki us meeting ke baad se sach mein aapke poore jism mein ek ajeeb sa sunn-pan aur bhari-pan baith gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bilkul. Moneylender ke aadmi ka jab bhi phone aata hai, meri saans atakne lagti hai. Bachhon ko samajh nahi aata ki unki maa achanak itni thaki hui kyun rehne lagi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the duty-based role of the mother trying to shield her children.
text: Akele in sab ka samna karte hue, aap bachhon ko is achanak aayi hui thakan aur dar se bachane ki lagatar koshish kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Par main unhe bacha nahi pa rahi. Bina support ke bachhon ko akele palne par waise hi log taane maarte hain. Ab yeh paiso ka stress... mera sar dard se phatne lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate the isolation and stigma of being a single mother in distress, ending softly.
text: Logon ke taane aur akele bachhon ki zimmedari ke is bojh mein, aap khud ko bohot akela pa rahi hain...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere poore jism mein ek ajeeb sa sunn-pan aur bhari-pan
text: Akeli hi toh hoon. Meri poori zindagi ki savings wipe out ho gayi us meeting ke baad. Ab toh subah uthkar unka lunch box banane ke khayal se hi mere poore jism mein ek ajeeb sa sunn-pan aur bhari-pan mehsoos hota hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the duration of the pain starting from the loss of savings to the present mornings.
text: Savings chale jaane ke us waqt se lekar aaj tak, yeh bhari-pan aapko subah theek se uthne bhi nahi de raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kyunki raat bhar neend ki kami rehti hai. Sirf yahi sochti rehti hoon ki moneylender ko kal kya jawab dungi. Darr lagta hai ki bachhon ka future kahin kharab na ho jaye meri wajah se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the core fear regarding the children's future caused by the debt.
text: Aapke andar yeh bada darr baith gaya hai ki is financial pareshani ka asar aage chalkar aapke bachhon ki zindagi par na pad jaye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi toh meri zindagi hain. Unke liye hi toh maine meeting mein aage badhkar loan maanga aur mazaak banwaya. Ek maa hone ke nate unka theek se khyal na rakh pane ka guilt mujhe andar se kha raha hai, thakan itni hai ki bas rona aata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the underlying exhaustion and trapped feeling of fighting for the kids while dealing with debt.
text: Mujhe lagta hai ki bachhon ki achhi zindagi ke liye akele ladte-ladte, aur is karz ke darr ke beech, aap poori tarah se EXHAUSTED aur TRAPPED mehsoos kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere poore jism mein ek ajeeb sa sunn-pan aur bhari-pan
text: Bilkul trapped hoon. Mujhe aur mazboot hona chahiye tha. Par ab moneylender ke naam se hi mere poore jism mein ek ajeeb sa sunn-pan aur bhari-pan wapas chha jata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate the physical toll of being a single mother dealing with severe debt, separating her worth from the struggle.
text: Ek akeli maa ke taur par itna bada financial dabav aur logon ki baatein akele jhelna kisi ko bhi tod sakta hai, is darr ki wajah se jism mein bhari-pan aana bohot swabhavik hai aur yeh aapki maa hone ki kabiliyat ko kam nahi karta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aisa lagta hai ki main akeli hi itni kamzor hoon. Baki sab kaise sambhal lete hain? Us din izzat udi, uske baad se himmat hi nahi bachi kisi se madad mangne ki.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Use a systemic anecdote to normalize the hidden struggles of single mothers dealing with debt.
text: Akele bachhon ko palne wali maaon mein yeh poori zimmedari aur karz ka bojh chup-chap uthane ka pattern bahut common hai — sirf aapka nahi, lekin koi bahar bolega nahi kyunki samaj mein pehle hi kamzor samajhne ka taana milta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap theek keh rahe hain. Log toh judge karne ke liye baithe hi hain. Par main aise darr darr ke nahi jee sakti, bachhon ke exams bhi aa rahe hain. Main sach mein theek hona chahti hoon, aap batao ab kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer small, completable somatic options that fit her demanding routine.
text: Abhi is thakan aur ghabrahat ko thoda halka karne ke liye hum do choti cheezein try kar sakte hain—ya toh raat ko jab bachhe so jayein toh 5 minute shanti se baith kar ek glass pani piyein, ya subah uthte hi bistar par do minute lambi saans lein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Subah uthte hi toh turant lunch box banane aur fees ki tension shuru ho jati hai. Raat ko pani peene wala shayad main kar sakti hoon. Par kya isse moneylender ki problem jayegi?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through the chosen night-time routine step-by-step to ground her.
text: Karz ki problem is se turant nahi jayegi, par yeh aapke shareer ko thodi himmat zaroor dega. Pehle raat ko sab kaam khatam hone par apni jagah aaram se baithein... phir dheere se ek ghoont pani piyein... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aise aaram se baithe hue sach mein bohot din ho gaye hain. Bachhon ke so jaane ke baad toh main bas savings ka hisaab soch kar ghut-ti rehti thi. Thoda rukna shayad zaroori hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic reframe about sudden debt to reduce her internal blame.
text: Bina kisi majboot financial support ke jab achanak savings wipe out ho jati hain, toh yeh ek bada jhatka hota hai jo poore daily routine ko hila deta hai, yeh darr aur thakan aapki kisi chook ki wajah se nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad main apne aap ko kuch zyada hi dosh de rahi thi. Galti meri thi par poora system hi mere khilaf khada lag raha hai. Par subah uth kar school lunch ka toh sochna hi padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect her unwavering commitment to her children's daily needs despite the systemic hurdles.
text: Apne aap ko dosh dene aur is darr ke bawajood, aapki sabse pehli koshish yahi hoti hai ki bachhon ki subah aur unka lunch kabhi na ruke.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere poore jism mein ek ajeeb sa sunn-pan aur bhari-pan
text: Wahi toh ek maa hone ki kimat hai. Agar main bikhri toh unka bura haal ho jayega. Par sach kahun, andar se mere poore jism mein ek ajeeb sa sunn-pan aur bhari-pan abhi bhi thoda sa chupa hua hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the lingering physical sensation without rushing to fix it completely.
text: Maa ka farz poori himmat se nibhate hue bhi, aap mehsoos kar rahi hain ki wo jo aapke poore jism mein ek ajeeb sa sunn-pan aur bhari-pan hai, wo abhi poori tarah gaya nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, thoda kam hua hai pichle kuch minat mein, par hai. Dimaag mein bas ek chinta hai ki agar moneylender ne school aakar tamasha kar diya toh meri bachhi kya sochegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the specific feared consequence related to the child's dignity.
text: Aapko har pal is baat ka ghabrahat bani rehti hai ki kahin bahar ke is aarthik tamashe ka asar school mein bachhi ki izzat par na pad jaye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kahan aapne. Meri izzat toh us meeting mein ja chuki hai, par bachhon ke samman ko aanch nahi aani chahiye. Aapse baat karke lag raha hai ki main apne asli darr ko samajh pa rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm her immense strength and clarity in protecting her children's dignity.
text: Apne bachhon ke samman ko bachane ki aapki yeh koshish sach mein bahut badi baat hai, ek aisi situation mein jahan har taraf se stress ho, aap poori himmat se unke aage khadi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Himmat juta rahi hoon dhire dhire. Aaj raat se woh 5 minute pani peene wala kaam zaroor karungi. Thodi der dimaag shant rahega toh kal subah shayad energy wapas aaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the active step chosen to shift the night-time routine.
text: Aaj raat se shuru karke, aapne apne dimaag aur shareer dono ko thoda aaram dene ka faisla liya hai, taki aane wala kal behtar ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kyunki main akele saari problems ek raat mein solve nahi kar sakti. Moneylender se bhi kal thoda dhairya se baat karne ki koshish karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the shift towards handling the relational stressor with patience.
text: Ab aap khud se thodi narmi bartate hue, us pareshani aur moneylender wale confrontation ko kal zyada shanti se handle karna chah rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Karna hi padega. Ghabrane se toh halat aur kharab hi ho rahe the. Waise, ajeeb baat hai, baat karte karte meri aankhon ki jalan aur body ka dard thoda halka lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the emotional relief that accompanies the physical easing.
text: Baat karte hue yeh mehsoos ho raha hai ki apne is akelepan ke bojh ko thoda share karne ke baad, aap aandar se thoda RELIEVED mehsoos kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot relieved. Mujhe ab tak kisi ne is nazariye se nahi dekha tha ki main akele itna kuch seh rahi hoon. Logon ne sirf meri badhti karz aur pareshani ko dekha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm the unseen struggle of her single motherhood and debt battle.
text: Logon ka dhyan aksar sirf bahar ke karz par jata hai, lekin uske peeche ek akeli maa ki kitni mehnat aur kitna darr chupa hota hai yeh samajhna aasaan nahi hota, aapki koshish sach mein badi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shukriya. Ab mujhe lagta hai main aaj raat theek se so paungi aur kal subah uth kar lunch box bana lungi. Mere bachhe meri zimmedari hain, aur main ab kamzor nahi padungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize that temporary exhaustion is part of her heavy burden, not a weakness.
text: Apni is zimmedari ke beech, yeh dhyan rakhna ki kabhi thak jana weakness nahi hai, balki yeh sirf is baat ka nishaan hai ki aap lagatar ek maa hone ki itni badi ladaai lad rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: gardan mein itni akdan hai ki hilna mushkil hai
text: Aaj meeting mein bezatti milne ke baad se mere kaano mein seetiyaan baj rahi hain aur gardan mein itni akdan hai ki hilna mushkil hai. Crop insurance na hone ki wajah se debt spiral badhta ja raha hai aur 'log kya kahenge' ka darr mere haazme ko bilkul bigad chuka hai. Is bhari-pan aur sharir ki thakan ne meri metro city mein survive karne ki kshamta hi khatam kar di hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the exact physical sensation using Lens A to establish connection with his body's reality.
text: Tumhare shabdon se samajh aa raha hai ki aaj ki meeting ke baad se sach mein gardan mein itni akdan hai ki hilna mushkil ho raha hai aur kaano mein seetiyaan baj rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan bhai, office mein manager ne sabke saamne suna diya target miss karne pe. Aur pichhe gaon mein papa ka phone aaya tha ki bank ka notice aane wala hai. Dono taraf se aisi maar padi hai ki bas sharir toot raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the dual duty pressure from work and village using Lens B to validate his burden.
text: Ek taraf office ka kaam aur doosri taraf gaon ke bank notice ki zimmedari, in dono ke beech tumhara sharir yeh saara bojh utha raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: gardan mein itni akdan hai ki hilna mushkil hai
text: Zimmedari toh uthani padegi na, waha EMI baaki hai. Par jab se loan ka debt spiral badha hai, gaon mein rishtedaar aur log kya kahenge ki chinta se neend udh gayi hai aur subah uthte hi gardan mein itni akdan hai ki hilna mushkil hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the feared consequence of societal judgment softly using Lens E in response to the stigma cue.
text: Logon ke taano ka darr sach mein andar tak dara deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot darata hai. Biradari waale toh waise hi baatein banate hain ki shehar gaya hai kamane, fir bhi khet bikne ki naubat aa gayi. Yeh sab baatein sun sun kar mera haazma bilkul bigad gaya hai aajkal.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking a question to explore how he is managing this dual pressure in the city.
text: In taano aur khet ke is darr ke beech, tum akele metro city mein apne is bhari-pan ko roz kaise jhelte ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Bas ghut ghut ke jhelta hoon. Kisko bataun? Agar MNC mein logon ko pata chala ki mera background aisa hai toh judgemental ho jayenge. Yeh fear aur fail hone ki feeling meri himmat tod rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting his unexpressed exhaustion due to debt and duty using the required formula.
text: Lagta hai is chhupane ke bojhe aur debt ki wajah se, tum andar se poori tarah exhaustion aur sharam mehsoos kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: gardan mein itni akdan hai ki hilna mushkil hai
text: Exactly. Sharam aati hai ki itna padh likh kar bhi khet nahi bacha pa raha aur waha office mein alag bezatti hai. Isi tension mein laptop pe dekhte dekhte gardan mein itni akdan hai ki hilna mushkil hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating his shame as culturally normal for an IT professional supporting a farming family.
text: Shehar aakar gaon ke karz ko akele sambhalna bohot thaka dene wala hota hai; is mahaul mein sharmindagi mehsoos karna ekdum aam hai, par yeh crop insurance ka fail hona tumhara personal failure nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Par liability toh meri hi bani na. Dono jagah expectation mujhse hi hai. Meeting mein jab manager ne aaj sabke saamne data dikha kar chillaya, tab toh laga ki meri saari izzat mitti mein mil gayi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Briefly sharing a systemic anecdote about corporate professionals hiding their financial realities to normalize his experience.
text: MNC jobs mein aisi bezatti chup chap sehna aur ghar ka financial pressure chhupana bohot common pattern hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki corporate survival ka sabko darr hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Corporate survival... haan wahi darr. Agar yeh job gayi toh debt spiral mujhe kha jayega aur log jeene nahi denge taane maar maar ke. Yeh tension har waqt dimaag pe haavi rehti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the tangled relational and professional stakes using Lens C.
text: Tumhari job bachane ki jaddojahad aur parivaar ko debt spiral se nikalne ki koshish, yeh dono aapas mein ulajh gaye hain aur tumhara dhyan baant rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul sahi kaha. Ulajh ke reh gaya hoon. Par is thakan aur haazme ki dikkat ke saath main kaam par focus nahi kar paunga aur job chali jayegi. Tum hi batao ab kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, immediate somatic options to manage physical distress.
text: Is physical thakan ko thoda shant karne ke liye hum do chhoti cheezein kar sakte hain: ya toh 2 minute apni desk se uthakar dheere se apni saanso par dhyan do, ya fir ek glass thanda pani dheere dheere piyo. Kya theek lag raha hai abhi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Pani peene wala theek lag raha hai. Gardan hilane ki toh abhi waise hi bilkul himmat nahi ho rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking through the chosen suggestion step by step.
text: Pehle ek glass pani le aao… phir aaram se baith kar ek ek sip dheere dheere piyo aur saans pe dhyan do… bas itna hi aaj ke liye karo.

speaker: Seeker
text: Pee raha hoon pani. Thoda sa gale ko thandak mili hai, par dimaag mein abhi bhi manager ki aawaz aur logon ke taane ghoom rahe hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the lingering duration of the distressing memory using Lens D.
text: Pichle kuch ghanton se yeh lagataar chalne wali manager ki aawaz abhi bhi dimaag mein goonj rahi hai aur tumhara peecha nahi chhod rahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, woh aawaz aur loan ki next EMI ka stress. Agle hafte due hai, uski fikar se mere andar ghabrahat badhti ja rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing the economic stress systemically using his vocabulary to normalize his distress.
text: Jab crop insurance jaisi badi systemic safety net toot jaati hai, toh middle-class families ka is debt spiral mein phasna ek structural issue hai, akele tumhari ya sirf gaon walon ki galti nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Structural issue hai, par EMI toh bank mujhse hi mangega na. Mujhe bas yeh sochna hai ki is bhari-pan ke bawajood main kal office kaise jaun bina breakdown ke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring his duty to continue pushing forward despite his condition using Lens B.
text: Tum apni family ki is karz ki zimmedari poori karne ke liye agle din ka kaam manage karna chahte ho, bhale hi sharir mein itna dard aur thakan ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, raasta toh nikalna hi padega. Shayad HR ya apne team lead se baat karke thoda extra time maang loon task ke liye, par darr lagta hai ki fir se bezatti na ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the feared consequence of repeated humiliation using Lens E.
text: Dubaara se meeting jaisi bezatti saamne aane ka darr tumhe us HR ya manager ke paas jaane se andar hi andar rok raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi pakda. Par agar baat nahi ki, toh andar hi andar ghut kar bimaar ho jaunga. Aur agar main physical level pe toot gaya toh EMI kaun bharega?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational priority placed on caregiving over his own health using Lens C.
text: Apne bimaar padne se zyada tumhe is baat ki chinta satae ja rahi hai ki tumhare tootne par tumhare ghar walo ki dekhbhaal kaise hogi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Family hi toh sab kuch hai. Unhi ke liye toh itni akdan jhel raha hoon. Soch raha hoon kal manager ko ek simple mail daal doon ki meri tabiyat theek nahi hai, bas task thoda baad mein submit karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirming his decision to communicate his physical limits safely.
text: Apne sharir ki thakan ko samajh kar manager ko formally mail likhne ka faisla lena ek bohot samajhdari ka kadam hai, jo tumhari kaam aur family dono ke prati lagan dikhata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bas umeed hai ki woh log isko bahaana na samjhein. Corporate life mein waise hi kisi ko kisi ki personal halaat ki padi nahi hoti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the prolonged disconnect in corporate environments using Lens D.
text: Lamba waqt lag jata hai is corporate mahaul mein logon ko ek doosre ki asali sthiti ko bina judge kiye samajhne mein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Par abhi mujhe khud ko theek rakhna hai. Baat karke waise thoda better lag raha hai, aur akdan bhi thodi si kam feel ho rahi hai abhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relief in his physical symptoms using Lens A.
text: Mujhe aaram mil raha hai yeh sunkar ki gardan ki akdan aur andar ka woh bhari-pan thoda sa halka mehsoos ho raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapne aaram se meri baat suni, wohi bahut hai. Varna bahar toh sirf kamyabi dikhani padti hai aur failures par taane hi sunne milte hain society se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Framing societal pressure as a structural flaw rather than a valid personal critique.
text: Humaari society mein hamesha success ko lekar unrealistic expectations hoti hain, isiliye log aisi taanebaazi karte hain jiska tumhari asli mehnat se koi lena-dena nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi baat hai, ab unki soch ko toh nahi badal sakta. Main bas abhi apni email draft karne ja raha hoon aur thoda so jaunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating his readiness and resilience moving forward.
text: Is kathin halaat mein bhi kal ke liye khud ko email ke zariye taiyar karna aur apna dhyan rakhna, tumhare andar ki sachhi mazbooti ko darshata hai.
